bibliography: A escolha da bibliografia depende do tema escolhido e constitui um dos trabalhos a realizar pelo candidato de forma a alicerçar o tema da sua Dissertação.
methodology: Also include the innovative methodologies used to support the teaching-learning process
objectives: Consolidate the knowledge and acquire competence abot the dissertation theme Develop and structure the investigation plan Develop the candidates' research capacity regarding the scientific and technological areas framed in the Dissertation theme Carry out the technological implementation or fieldwork corresponding to the proof of concept of the defended purpose Publicly defend the Thesis in front of the jury
organicUnit: ECATI - School of Communication, Architecture, Arts and Information Technologies
programme: Área de preenchimento obrigatório.The syllabus is defined in each case according to the topic chosen by the candidate based on his/her research work and suggestions from the supervisor.
presentation: Thesis Work is a course aimed at second at third-year PhD students. The syllabus is defined in each case according to the topic chosen by the candidate based on his/her research work and suggestions from the supervisor.
avaliacao: A avaliação desta unidade curricular é constituida pela defese pública perante um júri.
